review_notes.artifact_result: Roadmap 2.11 curated review artifact evaluation/artifacts/roadmap_2_11/curated_review_v1.json contains concrete per-item comparison results, category summaries, warning rollups, review queue entries, and readiness bucket output.
review_notes.candidate_decision: Evidence-backed compatibility fix candidates were identified from the curated review artifact.

candidates.finding_summary: The curated review artifact records an empty LLM output for a ranking-stability sample, and readiness marks llm_empty_output as a blocking warning case.
evidence: evaluation/artifacts/roadmap_2_11/curated_review_v1.json: review_queue sample_id curated_repeat_001 warning_cases includes llm_empty_output
evaluation/artifacts/roadmap_2_11/curated_review_v1.json: per_item_results sample_id curated_repeat_001 has legacy_tags [house] and llm_tags []
evaluation/artifacts/roadmap_2_11/curated_review_v1.json: readiness_buckets.decision_summary.blocking_findings includes blocking warning cases: llm_empty_output, no_shared_tags
candidates.proposed_change: Prepare a narrow weak-output handling review for empty LLM results so safe abstention remains explicit and compatibility semantics stay intact.
candidates.why_now: The concrete curated review artifact has a blocking empty-output warning in the review queue and readiness output.
candidates.why_safe: The candidate is evidence-only and limited to future offline-reviewed weak-output behavior; it does not change provider routing, default provider, runtime shadowing, or the external /classify contract.
candidates.test_plan: If implemented later, add focused tests for empty LLM outputs preserving response shape and compatibility semantics, then rerun Roadmap 2.11 artifact and manifest tests.
candidates.rollback: Remove the manifest candidate or revert any later weak-output handling change; legacy_musicnn remains the default provider throughout.
candidates.notes: This candidate does not approve implementation or cutover. It only records evidence for later targeted review.

candidates.finding_summary: The curated review artifact records a contract-semantics sample with partial LLM output and weak top score, but the pattern appears once in the current artifact.
evidence: evaluation/artifacts/roadmap_2_11/curated_review_v1.json: review_queue sample_id curated_golden_001 warning_cases includes llm_partial_output and llm_weak_top_score
evaluation/artifacts/roadmap_2_11/curated_review_v1.json: category_summaries category contract_semantics warning_case_counts includes llm_partial_output and llm_weak_top_score
candidates.proposed_change: Defer threshold or ranking adjustments until additional curated evidence shows the same weak-top or partial-output pattern across more than one sample.
candidates.why_now: The artifact makes the weak-score and partial-output warning visible, but the evidence is not yet recurring enough for a safe compatibility fix.
candidates.why_safe: Deferred status prevents speculative tuning while preserving the finding for later evidence-backed review.
candidates.test_plan: If later evidence justifies a fix, add focused threshold/ranking tests using concrete artifact-backed samples before changing behavior.
candidates.rollback: Leave thresholds and ranking behavior unchanged unless a later reviewed fix is implemented; remove this deferred candidate if later artifacts classify it as accepted drift.
candidates.notes: Single-sample evidence is insufficient for implementation. This is not a request to force LLM output to match legacy output byte-for-byte.

candidates.finding_summary: The curated review artifact records one genre-boundary sample with no shared tags between legacy and LLM outputs; readiness treats no_shared_tags as blocking, but the sample is explicitly hard and ambiguous.
evidence: evaluation/artifacts/roadmap_2_11/curated_review_v1.json: review_queue sample_id curated_golden_repeat_001 warning_cases includes no_shared_tags

evaluation/artifacts/roadmap_2_11/curated_review_v1.json: per_item_results sample_id curated_golden_repeat_001 has legacy_tags [shoegaze, dream pop], llm_tags [drum and bass, breakbeat], and shared_tags []
candidates.proposed_change: Defer prompt-discipline or compatibility review until more genre-boundary evidence confirms a repeatable no-shared-tags pattern.
candidates.why_now: The artifact records a blocking no-shared-tags warning, but one hard boundary sample is not enough to justify a prompt or compatibility fix.
candidates.why_safe: Deferred status avoids subjective genre tuning and broad taxonomy changes while preserving the concrete warning for later review.
candidates.test_plan: If later evidence repeats this pattern, add focused offline comparison tests around no-shared-tags genre-boundary samples before changing prompts or compatibility handling.
candidates.rollback: Keep current prompt and compatibility behavior unchanged; remove this deferred candidate if later review classifies the sample as accepted drift or no-fix.
candidates.notes: This candidate intentionally avoids treating one ambiguous genre disagreement as an implementation-ready fix.
